header.name: Jane Developer
header.tagline: Full-stack engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable systems

bullets.text: Led migration of monolithic API to microservices, reducing p99 latency by 60%
Designed and implemented a real-time event pipeline processing 1M+ events/day
Mentored 4 junior engineers through onboarding and code review
Built customer-facing dashboard used by 10K+ weekly active users
Optimised API performance via async execution and connection pooling, cutting average response time by 40%
Managed CI-style local build pipeline; structured and migrated test suite from 20% to 85% coverage
Multi-provider LLM router supporting 15+ backends with automatic failover
Streaming response processing with backpressure-aware async pipeline
One-page PDF rendering engine with deterministic font fallback ladder
Priority-driven bullet trimming that guarantees single-page output

achievements.text: Speaker at PyCon 2024: "Type-Safe APIs with Pydantic v2"
Open-source contributor to FastAPI with 3 merged PRs
Achieved Finalist status at HackLoop and 5th place at CodeFrenzy CTF
